task_completion.description: The Data Set is given the correct Name and Short Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Set configuration form, the 'Name' field contains exactly 'Cholera Outbreak Surveillance - Kenema' and the 'Short name' field contains exactly 'Cholera Surv Kenema'.

task_completion.description: The period type is set to Weekly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Set configuration form, the 'Period type' dropdown or selection field is set to 'Weekly'.

task_completion.description: At least 3 relevant data elements are assigned to the Data Set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Elements selection area (typically a dual-list box), the 'Selected' list contains at least 3 items related to the outbreak (e.g., containing keywords like Cholera, Diarrhoea, Dysentery, ORS, Dehydration, Cases, or Death).

task_completion.description: The Data Set is assigned to the Kenema organisation unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Organisation Units selection tree or assignment tab, the checkbox next to 'Kenema' (or Kenema District) is checked or highlighted as selected.

task_completion.description: The Data Set is successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification or the appearance of 'Cholera Outbreak Surveillance - Kenema' in the main list of Data Sets within the DHIS2 Maintenance app.

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web interface to configure the Data Set.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the DHIS2 application (likely the Maintenance app), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with genuine DHIS2 selection widgets for data elements and organisation units.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the standard DHIS2 dual-list boxes for data elements and the hierarchical tree structure for organisation units, rather than plain text lists.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor or document.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad, VSCode, etc.) used to mock up the task completion; all actions occur within the DHIS2 system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in the DHIS2 web application (specifically the Maintenance app for Data Sets). 'Weekly' is a standard DHIS2 period type. 'Kenema' is a valid district organisation unit in the Sierra Leone demo database. Valid data elements to look for in the selection list include those containing keywords: cholera, diarrhoea, dysentery, ors, dehydration, death, or cases.
